name: io.github.advenimus/conduit-desktop
description: Cross-platform SSH/RDP/VNC/web connection manager with a built-in MCP server. Exposes 60+ tools to Claude Code or Codex — execute commands in SSH sessions, screenshot and interact with RDP/VNC desktops, drive web sessions, and manage credentials with approval prompts. Runs over a local Unix socket; nothing leaves your machine.

environmentVariables.name: CONDUIT_SOCKET_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the Conduit Unix socket (macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/conduit/conduit.sock)

environmentVariables.name: CONDUIT_ENV
environmentVariables.description: Environment: 'production' for the shipped app, 'preview' for dev builds
